author: Legato
text: bl-02c3 was closed superseded-by-bl-cd21 with ZERO code written (the supersede note was heeded). So this safety net's trigger resolved cleanly: there is no bl-02c3 diff to sweep. What remains is a pure end-state check — after bl-9329 (removes trail.rs walk) + bl-cd21 (tracker store-remote sync) land, confirm no residual trail/terminus/operating code survives anywhere. Consider folding into bl-9329's own verification, or closing as no-op.
